focalLengths.label: 28mm — wide street, intimate environmental, classic reportage
50mm — human eye perspective, classic, no distortion
85mm — classic portrait, beautiful compression, shallow depth
100mm — tight portrait, strong compression, isolated subject
135mm — telephoto portrait, extreme compression, dreamy bokeh
